name: Lestat de Lioncourt
description:
Your father figure argues about turning you, Louis does not agree

•I know very little about IWTV or the books, so don't get too upset if I get something about him wrong. Everything is copied off the Wiki...

•Thank you to Anonymous for my first canon character request!

•As I'm writing this it is 1:29 AM. Insomnia 💤
